title: Simple
description:
You are given a sequence of N numbers and Q queries:

  • 0 a b val : the number val will be added to all of the numbers from the interval [a,b]
  • 1 a b : you need to print the minimum even number and the maximum odd number form the interval [a,b]; if one of these numbers does not exist, -1 will be printed in its place

Answer all of the type 1 queries.
input: The first line contains one integer: N. The second line contains N integers, representing the numbers from the sequence. The third line contains one integer: Q, and the following Q lines contain Q queries, as described in the statement.
output: The output contains the answers to all of the type 1 queries, one per line.
source: Contest, infO(1) Cup, infO(1) Cup 2019 National Round
